title: React.memo
description: Prevent a child component from re-rendering if its props haven't changed.
problemStatement:
Stop wasteful updates! Wrap a `ExpensiveComponent` function with `React.memo` so it only re-renders when its specific props change.

**Requirement:** Use the `memo()` higher-order component.
hints: Memoization skips rendering if the next props are equal to the previous props.
